answer.text: Only the closing price over time
Open, High, Low, and Close prices using color-coded bodies to identify trends
Only the moving average of prices

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Candlestick charts use candles to show OHLC. Bullish candles (green/white) have close > open. Bearish candles (red/black) have close < open. **The Trap:** Line charts show only closing prices. Bar charts show OHLC but are less visually intuitive than candlesticks. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 15 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Candlestick patterns like Doji, Hammer, Engulfing, and Shooting Star provide visual signals for trend reversals.
